title: Count Character Occurrences

content.problemStatement:
You are given two strings, `str1` and `str2`. Your mission is to calculate the total number of occurrences of each unique character of `str2` within the string `str1`.
The task is to find the **sum** of occurrences of all unique characters from `str2` in `str1` and return this total count.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
For each test case:

The first line contains the string `str1`.
The second line contains the string `str2`.




Output Format
For each test case, output the total sum of occurrences of characters in `str2` found in `str1` on a new line.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains the string str1 and the second line contains the string str2. Strings may contain any printable ASCII characters, including spaces.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single integer – the total number of occurrences in str1 of all distinct characters that appear in str2, on a new line.

sampleTestCases.input:
3
helloworld
do
abacabadabacaba
abcd
abc 
abcdabcdabcdabcd
sampleTestCases.explanation:
Test case 1: unique characters of "do" are d and o. In "helloworld" d appears once, o appears twice → total 3.
Test case 2: unique characters of "abcd" are a,b,c,d. Their frequencies in "abacabadabacaba" are 7,4,2,2 respectively → total 15.
Test case 3: unique characters of "abcdabcdabcdabcd" are a,b,c,d. In "abc " only a,b,c appear (once each) → total 3.
Unique characters of "ab" are a and b. In "aaaabbbb" a appears 4 times and b appears 4 times → total 8.
Unique characters of "aaabbb" are a and b, none of which occur in "xyz" → total 0.

hidden.label: stress case 2
hidden.input:
2
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
aeiou
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
xyz

hidden.label: stress case 4
hidden.input:
5
abcdeabcdeabcde
abc
123451234512345
12
!@#$%!@#$%
!@#
HelloHello
Hl
Space test

solution.approach: For each test case we only need to know which characters appear in str2. Since the alphabet size is limited to 256 printable ASCII characters we can store this information in a boolean array of size 256. First we mark every character of str2 as present. Then we scan str1 and increase the answer for every character whose flag is true. This runs in O(|str1|+|str2|) time per test case and uses O(256)=O(1) extra memory.
solution.timeComplexity: O(|str1| + |str2|) per test case, O(total length of all strings) overall.
